name: Dynamics 365
description: CRM and business applications platform. Monitor organizational data, contacts, and user access for compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Register an app in Azure AD with Dynamics CRM permissions
2. Grant admin consent
3. Register the app as an application user in Power Platform admin center
4. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: Tenant ID
credentialFields.helpText: Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Overview → Tenant ID.

checks.name: Dynamics 365 App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Dynamics 365 Dataverse API is accessible.

checks.name: Dynamics 365 Regulatory Contacts
checks.description: Verifies CRM contact records are accessible for regulatory liaison tracking.
